hero.subtitle: We build NE3/NE4 fibre networks and write the software we use on site. Tracked in real-time. On time, or we call you.

services.title: Two disciplines.

fiber.title: Fibre, end to end.

workmanager.title: Work Manager
workmanager.description: Progressive web app for fiber optic project management. Tracks the full lifecycle from blown fiber to certification and invoicing.

features.0: Full cycle: Blown → Spliced → Active → Certified → Invoiced
features.1: Access from any device, no installation needed
features.2: Real-time project progress and status tracking

fincontrol.title: FinControl

features.2: Cash flow reports and period analysis

bot.title: Nexus AI Bot

features.1: Integration with Telegram, WhatsApp and email

features.0: RAG over project docs, SOPs, and compliance databases
features.1: Automated data pipelines from field to reporting dashboard
